creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
My best tip for visiting Bangkok 👇   Split up your day in 2. Get up early and take full advantage of the time before the sun has burned through the clouds. It gets so hot at around noon that it’s hard to do anything outside. 

That’s when you take a break at a shopping mall or go to your hotel (perhaps the rooftop pool?😉).   In the evening, you can head out again and enjoy the bustling streets - maybe go down to Chinatown and get some street food and watch the chaos unfold; that’s definitely one of my favorite things to do in Bangkok.  What are your favourite things to do in Bangkok? Share them with your fellow travellers 👇  #bangkok #traveltips #thailandtravel
